description: HUD layer system -- 2D overlay rendered on top of the 3D scene for titles, captions, subtitles, and UI elements. Implemented as HTML/CSS elements positioned absolutely over the Three.js canvas in headless Chromium, not affected by perspective projection. Viewport-pinned positioning. Per AP-07 (never put text in parallax planes) and OQ-03 (subtitle/caption overlay scope for V1).
notes: Tier 3 spatial feature. Medium priority. Addresses OQ-03.
